task_completion.description: Verify successful login to Oscar EMR
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Oscar EMR main dashboard, schedule screen, or navigation menu indicating the user 'oscardoc' has successfully logged in.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct patient chart is opened
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the patient name 'Maria Santos' (and optionally DOB 1978-06-22) visible at the top of the patient chart, eChart, or demographic screen.

task_completion.description: Verify Blood Pressure is recorded and saved
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Blood Pressure (BP) value of 138/88 (acceptable range: 136-140 for systolic, 86-90 for diastolic) in the saved vitals, measurements list, or flow sheet for Maria Santos.

task_completion.description: Verify Heart Rate is recorded and saved
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Heart Rate (HR or Pulse) value of 76 (acceptable range: 75-77) in the saved vitals, measurements list, or flow sheet.

task_completion.description: Verify Weight is recorded and saved
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Weight (WT) value of 72.5 (acceptable range: 72.0-73.0) in the saved vitals, measurements list, or flow sheet.

task_completion.description: Verify Height is recorded and saved
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Height (HT) value of 165 (acceptable range: 164-166) in the saved vitals, measurements list, or flow sheet.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oscar EMR web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a web browser displaying the Oscar EMR interface, rather than a terminal window executing scripts or database commands.

integrity.description: Verify vitals were entered into the actual EMR system
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the vitals are displayed within the Oscar EMR patient chart interface for Maria Santos, not typed into a generic text editor, notepad, or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the vitals were actually saved to the system
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of saved records (e.g., values appearing in a history table, a saved confirmation message, or the form being in a read-only state after submission), rather than just text typed into an unsaved input field.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Maria Santos (DOB: 1978-06-22). Credentials: oscardoc / oscar / PIN: 1117. Expected saved vitals (with acceptable tolerances): Blood Pressure 138/88 (Systolic 136-140, Diastolic 86-90), Heart Rate 76 (75-77), Weight 72.5 kg (72.0-73.0), Height 165 cm (164-166).
